RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_TROUBLE_M: Show 3 random other event cards. Choose 1 to play immediately.
Choose an event card to play
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_ANOMALY_M: Show 3 random anomaly event cards. Choose 1 to play immediately.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_R: All players gain [blue]2[/blue] [power]Half Life Heal[/power], and their next Attack costs [blue]0[/blue].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_I: All units gain [blue]1[/blue] [weak]Weak[/weak]. All players gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_T: Every other player loses [blue]3[/blue] Gold. You gain [gold]StarLight[/gold] equal to [blue]5[/blue] times the number of other players.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_L: This turn, all players temporarily lose [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [green]Dexterity[/green]. All enemies lose [blue]2[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_B: All units take [blue]2[/blue] damage. All players gain [blue]1[/blue] [card]Giant Rock[/card] next turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_D: All enemies gain [blue]3[/blue] [power]Mark[/power], [blue]2[/blue] [vulnerable]Vulnerable[/vulnerable], and [blue]2[/blue] [weak]Weak[/weak]. All players gain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_ANOMALY_B: Choose [blue]1[/blue] normal event card other than [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card] and play it once. All allied persona relics advance their cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_FIGHT_FUN: Give each ally a [card]Giant Rock[/card] card ([exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust]+[ethereal]Ethereal[/ethereal]).
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_GIFT_FROM: Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) for all allies and gain {StarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_HAND_ERAS: Discard the rightmost card from all allies' hands.
Set all allies' HP to 1 and gain {Block:diff()} [blue]Block[/blue].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_DEUS_EX_M: Choose 1 event card other than [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card] and play it twice.
Choose an event card to play twice
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_PLAYER_RE: Only you make a judgment. On 1-3, you take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage and teammates take {TeamDamage:diff()} damage; on 4-6, you gain {SelfStarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold] and teammates gain {TeamStarLight:diff()} [gold]StarLight[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENTS_CONCEALI:
Apply 1 [power]Mark[/power] to a random non-Boss, non-Elite enemy.
Bonnie and the event trigger gain [power]Concealing[/power].

Apply 1 [power]Mark[/power] to a random non-Boss enemy.
Bonnie and the event trigger each take 1 Attack card from their Draw pile first, otherwise from their Discard pile; if neither pile has an Attack, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} instead.
Then they gain [power]Concealing[/power].

Apply 1 [power]Mark[/power] to all units.
Bonnie and the event trigger each take 1 Attack card from their Draw pile first, otherwise from their Discard pile; if neither pile has an Attack, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} instead.
Then they gain [power]Concealing[/power].

Apply 2 [power]Mark[/power] to all units.
All allies each take 1 Attack card from their Draw pile first, otherwise from their Discard pile; if neither pile has an Attack, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} instead.
Then all allies gain [power]Concealing[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_FAMOUS_BL: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. After playing this, consume up to 2 [power]Sword Aura[/power]. Then gain 1 [power]Sword Aura[/power].

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. After playing this, consume up to 2 [power]Sword Aura[/power]. Then gain 1 [power]Sword Aura[/power]. After playing this, deal an additional [blue]1-20[/blue] random damage.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_SAVE_ME_M: Target player draws 1 card and gains [power]Mouse Shield[/power] and [power]Counter[/power]. If that target is at 50% HP or less, you also gain [power]Mouse Shield[/power] and draw 1 card.
Spend 5 Gold. Target player gains 5 [gold]StarLight[/gold]. Your [relic]Persona Derivative: Wealth[/relic] counter +1.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_FATE_GUID: Advance your persona relic counters by 1 and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_ROYAL_PRE: Draw 3 cards. The drawn cards gain [gold]Temporary[/gold] and are discarded at end of turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_PRODUCT_R: Discard all cards in your hand. Draw cards equal to your original hand size + 1.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_SHADOW_FU: Count all enemy [power]Twin Shadows[/power]. Gain 1 temporary [green]Strength[/green] this turn for each separate shadow, then remove all enemy [power]Twin Shadows[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_SOLAR_BOM: Discard all cards in your hand. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times. For every 2 discarded cards, deal damage 1 additional time. For every {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} total cost among the discarded cards, increase this damage by 1. Discarded 0-cost cards count as {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Discarded X-cost cards count as your current Energy.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_BASE_ABILITY_OR:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the target. [gold]Unblockable[/gold].
When used as [gold]Orbital Bombardment Material[/gold], this card counts as [blue]2[/blue] cards and its cost counts as {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)}.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_CHAIN_REA: Each other player draws 1 card. If that player's hand has fewer than 4 cards, they draw 2 instead. Then add 1 [card]Bite[/card] to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_BITE.desc: Gain 1 stack of [power]Dragon Awakening[/power]. Then gain temporary [red]Strength[/red] equal to your current [power]Dragon Awakening[/power], up to 4.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_DRAGONS_R: Apply 1 [vulnerable]Vulnerable[/vulnerable] and 1 [weak]Weak[/weak]. Gain 3 temporary [red]Strength[/red], and until the enemy turn starts, ignore damage from enemy sources.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_MIXED_COC:
In single-player, this affects you. In multiplayer, choose an ally.
Discard up to 3 cards from your hand. Apply effects to the target based on [gold]Mixed[/gold], then draw cards equal to the number discarded.
Choose up to 3 cards to discard
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_CONCEALIN:
Apply [power]Investigation Target[/power] and [blue]2[/blue] [power]Mark[/power] to the target.
Gain [gold]StarLight[/gold] equal to [blue]2[/blue] times that target's current [power]Mark[/power].
See [gold]Investigation Progress[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_POWERFUL_:
Choose a player. Select up to [blue]3[/blue] cards from your hand and copy them into that player's hand.
Gain [gold]StarLight[/gold] equal to the number copied, discard the chosen cards, and gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold].
Choose up to 3 cards to copy and discard
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_UNSTOPPAB:
Immediately gain [power]Ready to Strike[/power].
Discard all Attack cards in your hand.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mud Truck Crash[/card].
Draw [blue]12[/blue] cards.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_REMOTE_IN:
Immediately gain [blue]1[/blue] Attack card to your hand; it costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
This turn, Attack cards you play do not trigger Cyber Kitty's passive firewall discard effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_TRUE_ME.d:
Choose a player. Both of you heal [blue]1[/blue] HP and gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red].
If your [power]Warm[/power] is at [blue]5[/blue], consume all of it and gain temporary [red]Strength[/red] equal to your current [green]Dexterity[/green] this turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_VAMPIRE_B:
If your HP is above [blue]50[/blue]% of your current Max HP, take [blue]6[/blue] damage.
Gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Bloodthirst[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_IRON_VIRG: Gain [power]Iron Virgin Ward[/power] and ignore damage until your next turn starts. If your persona's [power]Boundary Reinforcement[/power] has not triggered this turn, also gain 3 temporary [red]Strength[/red].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_COLLECTORS_CARD:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies and temporarily reduce their [red]Strength[/red] by {StrengthLoss:diff()}.
After being played, when you take damage, automatically play this card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]. Then return it to your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
If you have lost HP this turn, deal {BonusDamage:diff()} extra damage.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_CURIOUS_CANDY_M:
[exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust], [retain]Retain[/retain], costs [blue]0[/blue].
Spend [blue]12[/blue] Gold. Gain [blue]1[/blue] random candy potion.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_MUD_TRUCK:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Deal equal damage to all other enemies and apply [power]Fracture[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_NINJUTSU_: Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Add [blue]1[/blue] random Base Ability card to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_EVENT_THUNDER_A: Stun all enemy units. All players gain [power]Ringing[/power], draw {Cards:diff()} card, and gain {DrawCardsNextTurnPower:diff()} extra draw next turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_INVOKE_SP: Choose another player. Apply [power]Invoke Spirits[/power] to them. This turn, gain temporary [red]Strength[/red] and [green]Dexterity[/green] equal to [blue]50[/blue]% of that target's current values, plus [blue]30[/blue]% of their current [gold]Vigor[/gold] and [blue]30[/blue]% of their current Block, all rounded up.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_REALLY_AN: For your next passive roll from [relic]Persona: Uncle Pederman[/relic], all five results become the maximum value.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_CHANNEL_E: Heal {Heal:diff()} HP. If you currently have [power]Gathering Strength[/power], your Attack cards deal [blue]+4[/blue] damage this turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_CYBER_ANG: Target gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Fan[/power]. Gain [blue]1[/blue] plus that target's current [power]Fan[/power] stacks as [gold]StarLight[/gold], up to [blue]7[/blue]. If every enemy that currently has [power]Fan[/power] has more than [blue]3[/blue] stacks, gain [blue]2[/blue] [power]Regeneration[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_EMOTIONAL: Gain [power]Half Life Heal[/power] and temporary [green]Dexterity[/green] equal to your current [power]Love[/power] stacks for this turn. Then remove all [power]Love[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_LIVING_FO: Spend {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and [blue]1[/blue] stack of [relic]Persona Derivative: Living Folio[/relic]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Mark[/power]. If the target had at least [blue]3[/blue] [power]Mark[/power] before this card was played, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Then return this card to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_BIG_EATER: Add [blue]1[/blue] random [card]Chocolate Cake[/card] or [card]Hamburger[/card] to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_CARD_SKILL_FORTUNE_M: Consume [blue]1[/blue] stack of [relic]Personality Derivative: Fortune and Mischance[/relic].\nTarget a player. Heal them for [blue]2[/blue] HP and grant [power]Bai Ze Blessing[/power]. If the target is [relic]Persona: Feng[/relic], that target also gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power].\nReturn this card to your hand.
